message:
feat(ftui-render): add frame guardrails for memory budget and queue depth (bd-2vr05.8.6)

Adds frame_guardrails module with memory budget enforcement (soft/hard/
emergency limits), queue depth guardrails (configurable drop policies:
DropOldest/DropNewest/Backpressure), and a unified FrameGuardrails
facade that combines both into a per-frame GuardrailVerdict with
recommended degradation level and queue action. 45 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2vr05.3.5","title":"task(test): add large-scrollback performance and memory budget tests","description":"Stress tests for large histories with latency and memory budget assertions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Behavior in this task is deterministic for fixed inputs and capability profile.
- Required unit and/or E2E tests are added for the scoped behavior.
- Scope is complete only when dependencies remain satisfied and no regressions are introduced.

## Comprehensive Validation Hooks
- This task must add or update focused unit tests for core logic touched.
- This task must link to at least one end-to-end script path that validates integrated behavior.
- Validation output must include structured logs detailed enough for deterministic postmortem analysis.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
- Comprehensive unit tests are implemented for the scoped subsystem, including edge cases and regression vectors.
- Deterministic end-to-end scripts are implemented for the scoped workflows and runnable in CI.
- Test execution emits detailed structured logs (JSONL) including timestamps, correlation IDs, and failure context.
- At least one deliberate failure injection scenario is covered and produces actionable diagnostics.","notes":"Execution Notes
- Viewport semantics should remain stable under continuous output and user scrolling.
- Follow-output state transitions must be explicit (user override versus automatic resume).
- Resize behavior must be policy-driven and documented (especially reflow or no-reflow decisions).
- Performance tests should include pathological histories, not just happy-path demos.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:41.991212688Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","updated_at":"2026-02-11T06:22:29.140336922Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T06:22:29.140317305Z","close_reason":"Completed large-scrollback stress, bounded render-window, and failure-injection tests in frankenterm-web wasm; validated by targeted fmt/check/clippy/test and wasm32 no-run compile; quick E2E produced structured logs with 13/14 pass and existing inline_basic assertion failure","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmark","frankenterm","scrollback"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:41.991212688Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:13.498100854Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:13.884277995Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:14.263401903Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.4","title":"feature(frankenterm-js): selection, copy, and clipboard parity","description":"Background
- Selection and clipboard behavior are non-negotiable for terminal workflows (copy logs, commands, diagnostics).
- Edge cases around wraps, unicode, and scrolling are where many terminal emulators regress.

Goal
- Deliver resilient selection/copy/clipboard behavior with explicit policy and strong test coverage.

In Scope
- Rust-first selection state machine.
- Mouse and keyboard selection gestures.
- Extraction semantics for wrapped and unicode-rich content.
- Clipboard integration and paste-safety interactions.
- Stress testing under churn (output, scroll, resize).

Out of Scope
- Browser-specific one-off hacks that bypass core state model.

Why This Matters
- Reliable selection is a key adoption blocker for replacing xterm.js.

Acceptance Criteria
- Selection remains correct under heavy output and viewport changes.
- Copy output matches documented policy for wraps and graphemes.
- Clipboard flows are deterministic and test-backed.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
- Feature behavior is validated by comprehensive unit tests that cover core invariants and edge cases.
- Feature behavior is validated by end-to-end test scripts that exercise realistic user workflows.
- E2E runs emit detailed structured logs (JSONL or equivalent) sufficient for deterministic failure triage and replay.
- CI gates for this feature fail on regression in correctness, determinism, or declared standards scope.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:34.723118448Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","updated_at":"2026-02-11T03:03:15.418193173Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clipboard","frankenterm","selection","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:34.723118448Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:03.985157787Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vr05.4.1","title":"task(selection): build rust-first selection state machine","description":"Linear/rectangular selection model with deterministic range normalization.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Behavior in this task is deterministic for fixed inputs and capability profile.
- Required unit and/or E2E tests are added for the scoped behavior.
- Scope is complete only when dependencies remain satisfied and no regressions are introduced.

## Comprehensive Validation Hooks
- This task must add or update focused unit tests for core logic touched.
- This task must link to at least one end-to-end script path that validates integrated behavior.
- Validation output must include structured logs detailed enough for deterministic postmortem analysis.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
- Selection behavior is correct for drag, keyboard extension, and viewport offsets.
- Extraction output matches policy for wraps and unicode graphemes.
- Clipboard integration paths are deterministic and test-covered.
- Stress tests under output churn pass without corruption.

## Mandatory Cross-Cut Quality Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for the implementation surface and edge-case regressions touched by this task.
- Deterministic end-to-end scripts are required for workflows materially affected by this task, and must run in CI.
- Validation output must include detailed structured logs (JSONL) with timestamps, correlation IDs, and failure context sufficient for deterministic replay and triage.","notes":"Execution Notes
- Selection logic should live in deterministic core state, not browser-only side effects.
- Ensure extraction rules are documented and fixture-backed for wraps, unicode, and trailing-space policy.
- Clipboard integration must have clear host callback boundaries and explicit fallback behavior.
- Stress cases must include simultaneous output churn and viewport movement.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:42.370104573Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","updated_at":"2026-02-14T22:53:09.679495093Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T22:53:09.679475296Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenterm","selection","state-machine"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:14.646859293Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:42.370104573Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- WebGPU path remains primary and meets benchmark targets.
- Fallback backend correctness is verified by parity tests.
- Performance benchmarks are reproducible and versioned.
- Budget guardrails trigger predictable degradation instead of runaway behavior.

## Mandatory Cross-Cut Quality Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for the implementation surface and edge-case regressions touched by this task.
- Deterministic end-to-end scripts are required for workflows materially affected by this task, and must run in CI.
- Validation output must include detailed structured logs (JSONL) with timestamps, correlation IDs, and failure context sufficient for deterministic replay and triage.","notes":"Execution Notes
- WebGPU remains primary, but fallback correctness is mandatory for practical deployment.
- Backend abstraction must preserve patch semantics and interaction overlays across backends.
- Performance work should be measurement-driven with reproducible benchmark config.
- Budget guardrails should degrade gracefully and emit actionable evidence logs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:50.966772648Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","updated_at":"2026-02-11T05:35:54.917451906Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T05:35:54.917430516Z","close_reason":"Optimized WebGPU patch-upload fast path by coalescing adjacent dirty patch spans into larger contiguous upload runs, reducing queue.write_buffer call count under bursty updates while preserving deterministic ordering semantics (no overlap coalescing). Added coalescing helper and regression unit tests for adjacent merge behavior, overlap non-merge behavior, and out-of-bounds clipping. Validation: cargo fmt --check; cargo check --all-targets; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test -p frankenterm-web; cargo test -p frankenterm-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --no-run. E2E hook path: scripts/e2e_test.sh.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenterm","performance","webgpu"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:50.966772648Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:28.234170412Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2vr05.9","title":"feature(frankenterm-js): public SDK API, typing, migration guides, and examples","description":"Background
- Replacing xterm.js in production apps requires a stable, typed, and well-documented API.
- Developer adoption fails without clear integration patterns and migration guidance.

Goal
- Ship a clean public SDK contract with typing, docs, and examples for mainstream web stacks.

In Scope
- Stable API surface and versioning policy.
- Typed events and error model.
- Integration adapters/examples (vanilla and framework-based).
- Migration guide from xterm.js patterns.
- API reference and usage cookbook.

Out of Scope
- Implicit, undocumented behavior as integration contract.

Why This Matters
- Converts technical capability into practical adoption.

Acceptance Criteria
- API is documented enough for external teams to integrate confidently.
- Migration path is explicit and actionable.
- Docs/examples stay aligned with runtime behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
- Feature behavior is validated by comprehensive unit tests that cover core invariants and edge cases.
- Feature behavior is validated by end-to-end test scripts that exercise realistic user workflows.
- E2E runs emit detailed structured logs (JSONL or equivalent) sufficient for deterministic failure triage and replay.
- CI gates for this feature fail on regression in correctness, determinism, or declared standards scope.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:36.989963717Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:13:02.612800837Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","frankenterm","sdk","typescript"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:36.989963717Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:05.114841262Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:05.500554655Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:05.871443369Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:06.245432387Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:49:06.629774543Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- This task must add or update focused unit tests for core logic touched.

- Public API and typing are stable and documented.
- Runtime events/errors align with TypeScript definitions.

- Comprehensive unit tests are required for the implementation surface and edge-case regressions touched by this task.

- Validation output must include detailed structured logs (JSONL) with timestamps, correlation IDs, and failure context sufficient for deterministic replay and triage.","notes":"Execution Notes
- Public SDK should expose stable behavior contracts, not implementation internals.
- Type definitions and runtime payloads must stay in lockstep.
- Migration guidance should map real xterm usage patterns to first-party FrankenTerm alternatives.
- Examples should cover both minimal and production-like embedding patterns.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:52.664171986Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:22:22.007597818Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:22:22.007578882Z","close_reason":"Implemented stable API contract endpoints/docs and validation; task scope complete.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["api","frankenterm","sdk"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2vr05.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2vr05.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:52.664171986Z","created_by":"HazyFalcon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
